market.key_reason_en: SpaceX IPO debut with strong gains and continued SPX/SPY bullish momentum dominate recent posts.
market.key_reason_ko: 스페이스X IPO 강세 데뷔와 SPX/SPY 지속 상승 모멘텀이 최근 포스트를 지배하고 있다.

top_news.headline_en: SpaceX IPO debuts with ~19% pop, Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire
top_news.headline_ko: 스페이스X IPO 첫날 약 19% 급등, 일론 머스크 세계 최초 조 단위 부자 등극
top_news.summary_en: SpaceX valuation hits ~$2T after strong debut, sparking debates on aggressive lockups, insider sales, and forced ETF buying ahead of index inclusion.
top_news.summary_ko: 스페이스X가 강력한 데뷔 후 약 2조 달러 밸류에이션을 기록하며 락업 해제와 내부자 매도, ETF 강제 매수 논쟁을 일으켰다.

symbols.key_reason_en: TSMC positioned as core AI supply chain beneficiary with strong long-term compounding potential.
symbols.key_reason_ko: TSMC가 AI 공급망의 핵심으로 장기 복리 성장 잠재력이 강력하다고 평가됨.

top_news.headline_en: SpaceX surpasses TSMC in market cap after IPO
top_news.headline_ko: 스페이스X IPO 후 TSMC 시총 추월
top_news.summary_en: SpaceX has overtaken TSMC to become the world's 6th largest company by market cap following its IPO and strong performance.
top_news.summary_ko: 스페이스X가 IPO와 강력한 실적 후 TSMC를 제치고 세계 6위 시총 기업이 됨.

symbols.key_reason_en: Positive buzz around Nvidia-SpaceX partnership and attractive PEG valuation reinforcing AI leadership.
symbols.key_reason_ko: Nvidia-SpaceX 파트너십과 매력적인 PEG 밸류에이션이 AI 리더십을 뒷받침하며 긍정적 반응을 주도.

top_news.headline_en: NVIDIA Congratulates SpaceX on Historic IPO Debut

top_news.summary_en: Nvidia highlights nearly decade-long collaboration from 2016 DGX-1 to Starbase systems, generating major engagement.
top_news.summary_ko: Nvidia가 2016년 DGX-1부터 Starbase 시스템까지 10년 가까운 협력을 강조하며 큰 관심을 모음.

symbols.key_reason_en: Strong EPS growth, attractive PEG under 1, and internal AI cost discipline highlighted positively.
symbols.key_reason_ko: 강력한 EPS 성장, 1 미만 PEG, 내부 AI 비용 관리 노력이 긍정적으로 평가된다.

top_news.headline_en: Meta Cracks Down on Excessive Employee 'Token Use' for AI Models
top_news.headline_ko: 메타, 직원들의 과도한 AI '토큰 사용' 단속

symbols.key_reason_en: Strong focus on FSD v14.3 rollout, Optimus robot progress, and AI/robotics vision dominating discussions.
symbols.key_reason_ko: FSD v14.3 출시, Optimus 로봇 진전, AI/로보틱스 비전에 대한 논의가 주를 이룸.

top_news.headline_en: Tesla trading around $399-400 after +4.6% day, 10th largest company by market cap

symbols.key_reason_en: Posts show polarized debate between strong commercial growth and concerns over valuation plus recent price pullback.

symbols.key_reason_en: AI memory supercycle, HBM sold-out status and strong earnings expectations driving dip-buying and long-term bullish views.

symbols.key_reason_en: Strong earnings beat and China cyber threat report discussed alongside high valuation concerns and post-earnings sell-off.

symbols.key_reason_en: Short-term selloff from rotation into SpaceX but dip-buying dominates on strong AWS, AI runway and Prime Day catalyst with views of deep undervaluation.

symbols.key_reason_en: Xbox restructuring concerns offset by positive AI/cloud momentum and views of attractive valuation for core business.

symbols.key_reason_en: Mixed technical views and discussion of recent Siri AI updates with some long-term bullish comments amid spam.

symbols.key_reason_en: Positive posts highlight strong Google Cloud growth, AI product momentum, and attractive valuation.
